title: Imperial Government Complex
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''Imperial Government Complex''' was a large building on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Kal'Shebbol/Legends|Kal'Shebbol]]. It was used as both command centre and personal residence of [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] [[Kentor Sarne]] during his time as [[Governor/Legends|governor]] of the [[Kathol sector/Legends|Kathol sector]]. The complex remained a base of operations for Sarne [[Moff Sarne's forces|forces]] during the [[Post-Imperial era/Legends|New Republic era]].

==Information==
===Defenses===
The complex was protected by an energy shield, although the generators were antique compared to other systems, and [[1.4 FD P-Tower/Legends|1.4 FD P-Towers]] provided defense. Elements of [[Sarne's Stormtroopers]] were also presumably garrisoned at the base.

===Facilities===
The complex contained a command center, able to coordinate the defense of the planet, and the controls for the defense shield was located in the facility. The complex was also associated with the [[Ubiqtorate/Legends|Ubiqtorate]]; rumors circulated that they used to run their Internal Operations out of the building.

Sarne kept his quarters in the base, with a secret tunnel leading to a hangar bay where he stored the [[Carrack-class light cruiser/Legends|''Carrack''-class light cruiser]] ''[[Ambition]]''. The hangar also contained controls for the shields, enabling them to be raised or lowered to allow the ''Ambition'' to come and go as it pleased.

Sarne also maintained a large detention center in the complex, where he kept political prisoners, [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] officers on the wrong side of his "loyalty purges," and alien gladiators forced to fight for his amusement.

===The Battle of Kal'Shebbol===
During the [[Battle of Kal'Shebbol]], the complex was infiltrated by the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic's]] [[Katarn Commandos|Page's Commandos]], who were tasked with disabling the energy shield. Gaining entrance through an armored corridor that had been opened to the outside via an accident with a piece of [[DarkStryder technology]], the commandos successfully infiltrated the complex and disabled the shields, although Sarne managed to escape. However, during his escape, he had ordered the majority of officers to remain at their posts to keep fighting the invasion. These officers and soldiers were presumably either captured or killed when the New Republic took the complex.

===The New Republic===
With the New Republic in control of Kal'Shebbol, [[Lieutenant/Legends|Lieutenant]] [[Judder Page/Legends|Judder Page]] quickly made the complex his command center. Part of his reasoning was to protect whatever [[Ubiqtorate/Legends|Ubiqtorate]] information may have been left behind. Unfortunately, Sarne had initiated Omega order five, which had wiped the base's computers. The New Republic's Governor [[Monjai]] most likely used the facility as her headquarters when she took charge of the planet.

==Appearances==
*{{DarkStryder|adventure=The Saga Begins|book=The DarkStryder Campaign|reprint=yes}}
